subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden who cleaveth to the cord of My loving-kindness! Thou hast been mentioned by one who loveth Me and who hath arisen to serve My Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و المتمسکه بحبل عنایتی قد ذکرک من احبی و قام علی خدمه امری و وجد
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
